author: Daniel Kline, Celine Provini
title: Sneaker retailer files Chapter 11, closes most of its stores - thestreet.com
description: The chain shutters the majority of its locations after taking on unsustainable debt, highlighting the challenges in the sneaker market.
content:
Key Points
  • Sneakers shifted from sportswear to luxury fashion, fueling rapid resale market growth.
  • The retailer filed Chapter 11, citing financial strain and unsustainable leases.
